subject: Your Amazon.com.be order has been cancelled
body: Amazon.com.be Order Cancelled Order #171-4722458-5277114 www.amazon.com.be/ref=TE_POCE_tex_h _____________________________________________________________________ Hello, We're writing to let you know that your order has been cancelled because the payment couldn't be completed.You won't be charged for the cancelled An issuing bank will often decline an attempt to charge a card if the name, expiry date, or post code you entered doesn't match the bank's information. Before placing your next order, you can double-check your card details or add a new payment method here: https://www.amazon.com.be/cpe/managepaymentmethods?ref=TE_POCE_mpm ========================================================== Cancelled Order Details ========================================================== Visit our Help pages for more information About Payment Methods and to learn how to Change Order Information. We hope to see you again soon. Amazon.com.be https://www.amazon.com.be?ref=TE_POCE_tex_f _____________________________________________________________________ Please note: This e-mail was sent from a notification-only address that can't accept incoming e-mail. Please do not reply to this message.
